4:
You and Namingway ride the moon rover to the Moongate Hub, where you are welcomed by an eager Searchingway. He has much to tell you about the current state of the project and the assistance he hopes each of you will offer.
※You can now travel to the Moongate Hub by speaking with Drivingway in Bestways Burrow.
